test case id: tc-usecase-001 title: insertion of plant data module: inserimento/modifica piante source pages: 1,2,3 preconditions: user is authenticated and has permission to modify plant data. test data: plant name, species, location, and image. test steps: 1. navigate to the "inserimento/modifica piante" page. 2. enter the plant name, species, and location. 3. upload an image of the plant. 4. click the "save" button. expected result: the plant data is successfully inserted into the database, and a confirmation message is displayed.
